title: BEA Data Point
description: A single economic data point returned by the BEA Data API.

TableName.description: Name of the BEA table this data point belongs to.

SeriesCode.description: Unique series code identifying the specific economic series.

LineNumber.description: Line number in the source BEA table.

LineDescription.description: Human-readable description of the line item.

TimePeriod.description: Time period for the data point (e.g., 2023, 2023Q1, 2023M01).

CL_UNIT.description: Classification unit for the data value.

MULT.description: Multiplier applied to the data value (6 = millions of dollars).

DataValue.description: The actual economic data value as a string. May include commas as thousands separators.

NoteRef.description: Reference key to an associated note, if applicable.
